title: Figure 2 from: Pourmoghaddam MJ, Lambert C, Voglmayr H, Khodaparast SA, Stadler M (2026) A polyphasic study of Hypoxylaceae (Xylariales, Ascomycota) in Iran: new species and records from Hyrcanian forests. MycoKeys 131: 1-40. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.131.186541
author: Pourmoghaddam, Mohammad Javad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2 Annulohypoxylon annulatum (GUM 1614). A, B. Old and young stromatal habit; C. Close-up view of stroma surface; D. Close-up view of stroma surface with KOH-extractable pigments from stroma; E, F. Close-up view of ostiolar discs; G. Stroma in vertical section showing perithecia; H. Mature ascus in water; I. Ascus tip in Melzer's reagent (black arrow); J. Ascospore in water; K. Ascospores in 10% KOH with dehiscent perispore showing thickening. Scale bars: 2 mm (C); 1.5 mm (D); 0.5 mm (E, F); 1 mm (G); 20 µm (H); 10 µm (I–K).
